{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215901C53A01F97951CED9C841"}"},"total":489},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7316941130849977125","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的是太喜欢了，因为有些剧情能触动到我的心里，让我难受，搞得我身上酥麻酥麻的真的是太让我舒服了，因为我已经很久没有这样过了，现在整个人真的是太棒了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703609099,"group_id":"7296401499653934095","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"♡～","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/JdkKeoPNIO+YqmuvHkRMKBaDrHnEXeYNc0f95srAcT","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e8c961459f4044dca88a53ac8a619ae7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621189&x-signature=ATXGo43NsOw9pDlm%2BeZ4e%2BfXb3s%3D","user_id":"2617265441213323","user_name":"开水没我烧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2617265441213323","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296401499653934095","book_info":{"abstract":"［克系+穿书反派+病娇+修罗场］
        穿越成诡异都市文反派的陆宁，现在表现得有点慌。
　　刚刚觉醒了记忆的他，就发现自己刚刚和主角约好在线下干一架。
　　为了改变自己原本的命运，陆宁决心要给对方一点小小的反派震撼。
　　可是转头的功夫，陆宁便看到了顶着和小说设定里原主角一样名字的萝莉正在偷偷得看到自己，其表情从凶狠快速变成害怕。
　　陆宁改变了自己的计划。
　　“喂，要当我的朋友（狗）吗？”
    ................
主角小姐：“晤，所以当初第一次见面你就报了不好的心思吗？”
未婚妻：“......你开心就好，不用介意我的感受的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2ob9f0cfb73933988945a1e8805e45f756~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"东海神宫的龙中杰","author_id":"","book_id":"7296401499653934095","book_name":"疯了吧，萝莉主角妄图善堕我","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8c0d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7296401531996209664","read_count":"21256","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"891896"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"542","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,穿越,多女主,反派,穿书","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/c38bb57ffa34d9d94f38171e56b102ab~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285542&x-signature=%2F7fJHeuE9pXQlxs9KzPWSKkb%2BCM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"303888654155223","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"45"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321215901C53A01F97951CED9C841"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11670,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":36529},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7329769181926523710","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常不错的小说，至少看到现在还是。
嘿嘿，紧张而又刺激的感觉与我所想到的背德感如出一辙啊，高位的情感——扭曲的哦！不，是爱与卑微者的自由之间的矛盾，无限制的欺诈与背叛和无限的包容支配。真是令人欲罢不能。
真是好奇结局呢，感觉非常符合悲恋结局，毕竟灰也是在向高位进发嘛，支配与被支配，我要看血流成河[害羞][害羞][害羞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1706596525,"group_id":"7296401499653934095","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大概就这样吧，嗯，没错。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6loBg4Ms4dhra10vOzuA0I=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/efeda0fcc31649efb18a0c283614d34d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623049&x-signature=vZFz46%2BC5wx8fEtqK0Pyyz41lcE%3D","user_id":"105985522008383","user_name":"昙花寻月"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105985522008383","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1720623793,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7296401499653934095","book_info":{"abstract":"［克系+穿书反派+病娇+修罗场］
